Rolling pre-release - always contains the newest builds from `master`.

| File | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `Telescope-windows.zip` | Windows bundle. Extract and run `start.bat` (needs Python) or `TelescopeDesktop.exe` (standalone). Includes adb and UnityCapture virtual camera driver. |
| `Telescope-linux.tar.gz` | Linux bundle. Extract and run `./start.sh` - installs Python deps and launches the app. |
| `Telescope.apk` | Android app. |
